/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/test-tokenizer-1-bpe.dir/test-tokenizer-1-bpe.cpp.o" -o ../bin/test-tokenizer-1-bpe  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/dev/repos/turboquant-cpu/llama.cpp/build/bin: ../common/libcommon.a ../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.3 ../bin/libggml.so.0.9.5 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.5 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.5
